summary: Final-year Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning undergraduate with a strong foundation in software engineering and full-stack development. Proficient in building scalable web applications using Python (FastAPI) and with hands-on exposure to the MERN stack for end-to-end product development. Experienced in designing APIs, integrating databases, and deploying efficient microservice-based architectures. Leveraging an AIML background, I bring expertise in data-driven development, including integrating ML models into production workflows and developing automation/analytics features that enhance user experience. Passionate about solving real-world problems through clean code, performance-focused design, and continuous learning across backend, frontend, and machine learning engineering.

education.degree: B.E in Artificial Intelligence Machine Learning
education.institution: Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology, Hyderabad, India

projects.title: Mamba-Based Hybrid Model with One-Class SVM for Open-Set Hyper-spectral Image Classification
highlights: Designed a deep learning framework integrating CNN-based spatial processing with Mamba state-space spectral modeling for high-fidelity hyperspectral feature extraction.
Implemented a One-Class SVM on learned embeddings to achieve robust open-set recognition, enabling detection of unseen land-cover categories during inference.

Trained and evaluated the model on the Indian Pines dataset, achieving 99.16% closed-set accuracy, and 94.68% AUC-ROC for unknown class detection and outperforming existing HSI classification baselines.
Published research paper demonstrating the model’s real-world applicability for remote sensing tasks like precision agriculture, environmental monitoring, and defense-grade anomaly detection.

projects.title: AI-Driven Demand Forecasting & Inventory Optimization Microservice
highlights: Built a production-style microservice to forecast product demand using a GRU-based time-series model and optimize inventory levels for retail scenarios.
Developed RESTful APIs with FastAPI for products, sales, forecasts, and inventory, integrated with MySQL via SQLAlchemy ORM and Redis caching for fast responses.
Containerized the service using Docker and docker-compose, added JWT-based authentication, environment-based configuration, and pytest test cases for reliable deployment.

projects.title: Voice Assistant using Vapi
highlights: Built an interactive voice assistant using React, TypeScript, and the Vapi API for real-time communication.
Enabled speech-to-text transcription and live demo deployment using Vite for optimized builds.
Demonstrated full-stack lifecycle management from development to deployment.
